notes: Solid asteroids implementation with correct wrapping, splitting, and wave progression, but ship is always visible on title screen and there's no thrust flame visual or invincibility frames after death.
Accurate scoring and splitting, but suffers from a game-breaking respawn bug (dying near the center instantly drains all lives) and hitboxes that are half the visual size of the asteroids.

Core loop, shooting, splitting, lives, waves, and overlays exist, but wave progression is incorrectly driven from render(), there is no ship friction or respawn safety, and leaving dead asteroids in the array makes the implementation feel rough rather than polished.
